heroes.title:

responsibility. Guided by
experience.

corporate.description: Copper Giant is part of the Fiore Group, advancing high-quality copper projects responsibly, efficiently, and with long-term positive impact.

mocoa.description: The Mocoa deposit ranks among the largest undeveloped copper resources in the Americas.

home.title: Copper Today
home.heading: The world needs more copper.
home.body: Every electric vehicle, every wind turbine, every grid upgrade demands exponentially more copper than the fossil fuel equivalent. Supply isn't keeping up.

home.title: Mocoa at Scale
home.heading: A world-class asset in a tier-1 jurisdiction.
home.body: One of the largest undeveloped copper resources in the Americas. At-surface mineralization. District-scale potential beyond the current resource footprint.

home.title: Team
home.heading: Meet the team behind the discovery.
home.body: A management team with a proven track record of finding and building mines. Backed by the Fiore Group.

home.title: Investment Thesis
home.heading: Why Copper Giant?
home.body: Strong copper fundamentals, a world-class resource in a mining-friendly jurisdiction, an experienced team, and a clear path to value creation.

core_values.title: Respect
core_values.body: For the people, the culture, and the land. We bring it to every interaction and believe it is present in the strongest of relationships.

core_values.title: Responsibility
core_values.body: We own the full impact of what we do. That means protecting the land, culture, and trust around us. It also means advancing something that can matter far beyond us.

core_values.title: Good Neighbor
core_values.body: When we face decisions, our guidance is simple: what would a good neighbor do? It gives each of us the freedom and responsibility to listen first, act with care, and look for ways to build strength together.

esg_cards.title: Community First
esg_cards.body: 89% of our workforce comes from local communities. We invest in education, healthcare, and infrastructure alongside our operations.

esg_cards.title: Environmental Stewardship
esg_cards.body: We operate with full environmental impact assessments, responsible water management, and progressive reclamation planning.

esg_cards.title: Indigenous Partnerships
esg_cards.body: Our Good Neighbor Agreements with local Indigenous communities set the standard for respectful, mutually beneficial relationships.

esg_cards.title: Sustainable Future
esg_cards.body: Every step of our operations is designed with long-term sustainability in mind — creating value that outlasts the mine.
